summary: Open exterior balcony area with composite deck flooring, painted rendered walls and black metal balustrading. Overall decorative order appears good and the space looks structurally sound, with only minor surface marking visible; the balcony is generally clean and well maintained. No loose or damaged fittings are evident in the images provided.

items.name: Balcony floor
items.description: Grey composite decking boards laid lengthways across the full balcony area.
defects: small white surface mark visible mid level to floor

items.name: External walls
items.description: Smooth painted exterior wall surfaces to the balcony, light cream/white finish.

items.name: Ceiling / soffit
items.description: External balcony soffit above, painted light cream/white.

items.name: Balcony door
items.description: Black framed glazed sliding/patio door with reflective glass to the interior access point.

items.name: Door frame
items.description: Black metal/painted frame surrounding the balcony access door.

items.name: Balustrade / railings
items.description: Black painted metal balcony balustrade with vertical bars and top rail around perimeter.

items.name: Sliding door threshold strip
items.description: Narrow threshold between interior flooring and balcony decking at the door opening.

items.name: Balcony drainage / fixing caps
items.description: Small white circular floor fittings/caps set into the decking surface.
